name: The Sermon of Ash
description: Brother Maren asks the player to retrieve a sacred text from the Church Outpost that could prove his innocence — or confirm his guilt.

DISCOVERED.journal_entry: Brother Maren claims there is a sacred text at the Church Outpost that will prove he was ordered to come to Ashvale, not sent as a poisoner. He begged me to retrieve it.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: I'm heading to the Church Outpost to find the Tome of Directives — the record of all orders given by the Ashen Light's inner circle. Maren says it's in the reliquary beneath the chapel.
objectives: Find the reliquary beneath the chapel

OUTPOST_REACHED.journal_entry: The Church Outpost is heavily guarded. The reliquary is below the main chapel. I'll need to find a way in — stealth, persuasion, or force.
objectives: Enter the reliquary (stealth, persuasion, or force)
Read the relevant entry about Maren's orders

TEXT_FOUND.journal_entry: I found the Tome. The entry about Maren's assignment to Ashvale is here. The truth is in my hands — but what I do with it will change everything.
objectives: Decide what to do with the text

COMPLETED_PAWN.journal_entry: The text proves it: the Church ordered Maren to Ashvale specifically to 'prepare the flock for purification.' He was a pawn — following orders he didn't fully understand. The guilt isn't his alone.

COMPLETED_GUILTY.journal_entry: The text is damning. Maren volunteered for the Ashvale mission. He wrote a letter requesting the assignment, calling it 'an opportunity for true purification.' He chose this.

COMPLETED_DESTROYED.journal_entry: I burned the Tome. No one will ever know the truth. Maren's guilt or innocence dies with the ash. He looked relieved. I'm not sure I am.

COMPLETED_BLACKMAIL.journal_entry: I kept the Tome and sent word to the Church's inner circle: pay up, or the Tome goes public. Dangerous game — but lucrative.
